name: codereview
description: Code review toolkit: automated pre-PR review with severity grading, TOCTOU race condition detection, accessibility checks, data integrity analysis, and multi-reviewer PR comment resolver (CodeRabbit, Copilot, Gemini, Codex) with GitHub conversation resolution and model-tier routing for token efficiency. Stack-agnostic with TypeScript/React defaults and dotnet preset for C#/.NET projects.
